---
title: "QCIPU 2026 — Computational Labs"
---

Hands-on Jupyter labs for the **QCIPU 2026** school (June 8–26, 2026).

**Labs are released daily.** Each lab appears in the sidebar on the day it is
taught — so check back each morning for the day's notebook. Labs from earlier in
the school stay available, and upcoming labs are added as the school progresses.

## How to use these labs

- Browse labs by week in the **sidebar**.
- On any lab page, click the **▶ Open in Colab** badge at the top to run it in your
  browser — no installation needed. The first code cell installs the packages the
  lab uses (e.g. `qiskit`).
- To keep your work in Colab, use **File → Save a copy in Drive**.

The code cells you see here are the starting point; you'll fill in the parts marked
`???` (or `# your code here`) when you run the notebook.
